query:
SELECT cg.id, cg.name, cg.minQuantity, cg.maxQuantity, cg.productId, 
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id) as totalItems,
       (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM complementItems ci WHERE ci.groupId = cg.id AND ci.isActive = 1) as activeItems
FROM complementGroups cg 
JOIN products p ON p.id = cg.productId 
WHERE p.establishmentId = 60018 AND cg.name LIKE '%Adicionais%' AND cg.maxQuantity = 50
LIMIT 5;
